summary: The implementation successfully addresses all core requirements. The platform includes a welcoming homepage with navigation, tutorials organized by difficulty covering core Python concepts, practice exercises with an interactive code editor, user progress tracking across sessions, simulated code execution with feedback, and a warm educational design theme. All major features are present, though the code execution system uses simplified validation rather than full Python interpretation (as expected per constraints).

hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention user authentication, login, or Internet Identity. The implementation includes useInternetIdentity hook, login/logout functionality, and identity-based user isolation, which were not requested.
The BuildRequest specifies a warm, educational visual design theme but does not request dark mode or theme switching capabilities. The CSS includes complete dark theme color definitions.
While warm colors are requested, the specific implementation of custom shadow utilities was not part of the requirements.
